channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Donald Trump open to Elon Musk buying TikTok
item.description: TikTok restored service to U.S. users Sunday afternoon and credited Trump for pushing to keep the app operational.
item.dc:creator: Liz Jassin, NewsNation

item.title: Guitarist John Sykes of Whitesnake, Thin Lizzy dies
item.description: "In his final days, he spoke of his sincere love and gratitude for his fans who stuck by him through all these years," a statement released read.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, NewsNation

item.title: Colombians flee to Venezuela as clashes between rebel groups escalate in coca-rich border region
item.description: TRES BOCAS, Colombia (AP) — The Colombian border village of Tres Bocas has become a ghost town as residents flee to neighboring Venezuela to escape a new wave of violence in Colombia’s Catatumbo region that has left at least 80 people dead and displaced thousands.
item.dc:creator: FERNANDO VERGARA and MANUEL RUEDA, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: White House cheers release of two Americans freed in a swap with Taliban brokered by Biden, Qatar
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A prisoner swap between the United States and Afghanistan's Taliban freed two Americans in exchange for a Taliban figure imprisoned for life in California on drug trafficking and terrorism charges, officials said Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: ZEKE MILLER, JON GAMBRELL and AAMER MADHANI, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Trump fires heads of TSA, Coast Guard and guts key aviation safety advisory committee
item.description: President Donald Trump moved quickly to remake the Department of Homeland Security Tuesday, firing the heads of the Transportation Security Administration and Coast Guard before their terms are up and eliminated all the members of a key aviation security advisory group.
item.dc:creator: JOSH FUNK, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump defends pardons for rioters and suggests Proud Boys could have place in politics
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Donald Trump on his first full day in office defended his decision to pardon people convicted of assaulting police officers during the 2021 attack on the Capitol and suggested there could be a place in U.S.
item.dc:creator: MICHELLE L. PRICE and ZEKE MILLER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Warnings for dangerous winds extended in Southern California as new wildfires break out
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Forecasters warned that dangerous winds will buffet Southern California for at least two more days as new wildfires broke out on Tuesday, a pair of major Los Angeles-area blazes burned for a third week, and officials made preparations to protect scorched neighborhoods from toxic a
item.dc:creator: CHRISTOPHER WEBER, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: US border patrol agent was fatally shot in Vermont near Canada
item.description: Authorities on Tuesday were investigating a fatal shooting of a U.S. Border Patrol agent that also left a suspect dead and another injured on a Vermont highway near Canada, authorities said. Agent David Maland was killed Monday afternoon by gunfire following a traffic stop, a U.S.
item.dc:creator: KATHY McCORMACK and PATRICK WHITTLE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Residents ordered to pay $850,000 bond to appeal Ohio derailment settlement vow not to give up
item.description: The residents who question whether Norfolk Southern's $600 million settlement offers enough compensation for the East Palestine train crash don't plan to let a judge's order requiring an $850,000 bond derail their appeal.
item.dc:creator: Josh Funk, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: 11-year-old pulls ultra rare Paul Skenes rookie card, Pirates says massive trade deal stands
item.description: The card, which contains the "Debut Patch" worn by Paul Skenes, quickly became a highly-coveted item. After months of search, an 11-year-old has reportedly come up with it.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KRON4

item.title: The ash left behind by the Los Angeles wildfires might be toxic, experts warn
item.description: Toni Boucher threw up the first time she saw the charred remains of her home and neighborhood after this month’s deadly Los Angeles-area wildfires. Now she wonders if it’s worth it to go back to sift through the ashes and try to find her grandmother’s wedding ring.
item.dc:creator: MELINA WALLING, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: First female Coast Guard commandant ousted
item.description: Coast Guard Commandant Adm. Linda Fagan, the first female uniformed leader of an Armed Forces branch in U.S. history, was ousted by the Trump administration with no explanation late Monday.
item.dc:creator: Ellen Mitchell, WFLA, NBC

item.title: American deputy killed by stray bullet on Turks and Caicos vacation
item.description: Illinois sheriff's deputy Shamone Duncan was killed alongside a local resident while on vacation in Turks and Caicos for her sister's birthday this weekend.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bay Area tech CEOs get front-row seats at Trump inauguration
item.description: (KRON) -- The biggest tech leaders of Silicon Valley got a front-row seat at President Donald Trump's inauguration on Monday. There has been a sudden support this administration has gained from the tech industry.
item.dc:creator: Sara Stinson, KRON4

item.title: Mt. Denali to be renamed Mt. McKinley, Trump says
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (WFLA) — President Donald Trump announced that he would be renaming Alaska's Mt. Denali, the highest peak in North America, as part of his first-day actions in office during his inauguration. "We will restore the name of a great president, William McKinley, to Mt.
item.dc:creator: Nathaniel Rodriguez, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Costco workers authorize nationwide strike
item.description: Thousands of Costco workers nationwide voted Sunday to authorize a strike if a contract is not reached by the end of the month.
item.dc:creator: Tony Kurzweil, KRON4

item.title: Melania Trump hat: What people had to say about Inauguration Day fashion
item.description: Of all the things that people could be talking about on Inauguration Day, it didn't take long for people to latch onto the attire of Melania Trump, with one point of discussion taking the lead: her hat.
item.dc:creator: Brian Farrell, Fox 5

item.title: WATCH: Carrie Underwood sings 'America the Beautiful' a cappella after apparent tech issue at inauguration
item.description: An apparent technical issue didn't stop Carrie Underwood from delivering "America the Beautiful" during the second inauguration of President Trump on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, KTLA 5

item.title: Longtime Planned Parenthood head Cecile Richards dies at 67
item.description: Cecile Richards, the former president of Planned Parenthood, died at the age of 67 on Monday after a battle with cancer.
item.dc:creator: Sophia Vento, WFLA, NBC

item.title: WATCH: Carrie Underwood sings 'America the Beautiful' a cappella after apparent tech issue at inauguration
item.description: An apparent technical issue didn't stop Carrie Underwood from delivering "America the Beautiful" during the second inauguration of President Trump on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, KRON4

item.title: Trump administration sued over DOGE as soon as swearing-in over
item.description: President Trump’s new "Department of Government Efficiency" (DOGE) was sued multiple times before his inauguration ceremony in the Capitol Rotunda concluded. In the moments after Trump’s swearing-in, three lawsuits were filed in D.C.
item.dc:creator: Zach Schonfeld, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Trump inauguration to kick off 100-day rush
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump is set to be sworn in at the Capitol on Monday, solidifying his stunning return to the White House and kicking off what is expected to be a busy 100-day rush focused on a handful of hot-button issues.
item.dc:creator: Mychael Schnell, ABC 4

item.title: Barkley runs for 78- and 62-yard TDs in the snow and Eagles top Rams 28-22 to head to NFC title game
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Saquon Barkley blew through a hole and ran untouched in the wintry mix, the Eagles' 2,000-yard rusher smacking his helmet with his hand on his final snowy steps of a 78-yard touchdown run.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: 5 takeaways from Trump's inauguration eve rally
item.description: President-elect Trump on Sunday rallied with supporters in Washington, D.C., on the eve of his second inauguration, taking a victory lap and teasing an expected barrage of activity on his first day in office. Here are five takeaways from Trump’s rally at Capital One Arena.
item.dc:creator: Julia Mueller, WGN 9

item.title: These notable inaugurations weren't held at the US Capitol. Here's why
item.description: For decades, Americans have gathered at the Capitol Building in Washington D.C. to watch the inauguration of the incoming president, with some noteworthy exceptions.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Tanner, ABC 4

item.title: TikTok says it's in the process of restoring service to US users
item.description: Millions of TikTok users in the United States were no longer able to watch or post videos on the social media platform as a federal ban on the immensely popular video-sharing app took effect Sunday amid questions over how long the blackout might last.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Missouri lawmakers are going after voter-approved abortion rights. Voters will likely reelect them
item.description: JEFFERSON CITY, Mo. (AP) — Voters in Missouri last election approved a constitutional amendment that promised to undo the state's near-total abortion ban.
item.dc:creator: SUMMER BALLENTINE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: ESPN college basketball analyst Dick Vitale's return to broadcasting delayed by accident at home
item.description: Dick Vitale's return to broadcasting following cancer treatments will be delayed after the ESPN college basketball analyst had an accident at his Florida home. Vitale announced Saturday he will not be on the call for next Saturday's game between No.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Extreme cold forecast for much of US in coming days
item.description: BISMARCK, N.D. (AP) — Another blast of winter weather is expected in parts of the U.S. in the coming days, including bone-chilling wind in the Northern Plains and unusual snow and ice in the Gulf Coast area. Cold weather forecasted for Monday for Washington, D.C.
item.dc:creator: JACK DURA and JULIE WALKER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: A$AP Rocky’s shooting trial is set to begin. Here’s what to know about the case
item.description: A$AP Rocky is at a crossroads. He could soar to new heights of celebrity in 2025, or be brought back to earth quickly by a trial starting Tuesday that could lead to his imprisonment for years.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW DALTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Georgia appeals court sides with Trump in affirming dismissal of 6 state charges
item.description: A Georgia appeals court on Friday affirmed the dismissal of six counts in the state's 2020 election interference against President-elect Trump and his allies, upholding a trial judge's decision that the charges must be thrown out due to a lack of detail.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, WGN 9
